query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tasks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assigned_to` int,
  `client_id` int,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `priority` enum('urgent','high','medium','low') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed','cancelled','overdue') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `category` enum('client_review','compliance','onboarding','follow_up','planning','admin','meeting_prep','document','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  `due_date` timestamp NULL,
  `completed_at` timestamp NULL,
  `recurring` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `recurring_interval` enum('daily','weekly','monthly','quarterly','annually'),
  `related_entity_type` varchar(64),
  `related_entity_id` int,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `comms_log` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `client_id` int,
  `template_id` varchar(128),
  `channel` enum('email','sms','letter','portal_message') DEFAULT 'email',
  `category` varchar(64),
  `subject` varchar(512),
  `body` text,
  `status` enum('draft','sent','scheduled','failed') DEFAULT 'draft',
  `scheduled_at` timestamp NULL,
  `sent_at` timestamp NULL,
  `compliance_flags` json,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `saved_analyses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `client_id` int,
  `analysis_type` enum('tax_projection','ss_optimization','hsa_optimization','medicare_navigation','charitable_giving','divorce_financial','education_plan','fee_comparison') NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256),
  `input_json` text,
  `result_json` text,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
